title: Pulling Subitem's Status via API using graph ql query
excerpt: Can we pull Subitem’s Status using graphql query? Can you provide a query if possible?

posts.author: AditeeR (Aditee Raipurkar)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we pull Subitem’s Status using graphql query? Can you provide a query if possible?

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Yes you can Subitems

{
  boards(ids: **yourBoardId**) {
    id
    name
    items (limit: 10) {
      id
      name
      column_values {
        id
        value
        text
      }
      subitems {
        id
        name
        column_values (ids: **yourColumnId**){
          id
          value
          text
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

You just need to add the columns ids argument to the subitms column values field

Hope this helps
